title: cirsium brachiatum
intro: Cirsium brachiatum, also known as the roadside thistle or cotton thistle, is a species of thistle that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cirsium brachiatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and provide relief from digestive problems like diarrhea and constipation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
